name: City Sweeper Truck Driver Simulator VR

reviews.review_description: Too bad the progress I made in this game doesn’t count as practical driving experience. I’d pass the test for sure! :) Jokes aside, the game actually helped me understand how a vehicle's axles behave during steering, both when driving forward and in reverse and I didn’t even have to crash my instructor’s car to learn it.  I really love the working side mirrors, it genuinely feels like I’m sitting inside a real street sweeper. I can see the improvements and changes with each update, and the new money-making mechanics are hilarious too. Keep up the great work, devs!

reviews.review_title: A surprisingly relaxing and immersive VR
reviews.review_description: City Sweeper VR is one of those hidden gems that makes you slow down and enjoy the little things. The detailed city environment and realistic sweeping mechanics make you feel like you're really there, keeping the streets clean. It’s surprisingly satisfying to drive around and complete tasks at your own pace. The controls are intuitive, the visuals are smooth, and the chill atmosphere makes it perfect for casual play. Highly recommended for fans of simulator games who want something different in VR!

If you are looking for a unique VR game, this simulator offers a fun experience. The graphics and the detailed models for the vehicles look good. Earning money by cleaning is simple, but the game adds funny side objectives like bumping into objects, which breaks up the routine. It gives a feeling of accomplishment when you complete a cleaning task. This game is suitable for people who enjoy driving simulations with an unusual goal.

This game has a fun and simple idea. I really enjoyed the chance to be the city sweeper in a virtual reality setting. The truck models look good, and the city environment is generally well designed. It offers clear, easy objectives and provides a relaxing experience of making the virtual streets clean. It is an interesting VR game that many people might enjoy trying out.

reviews.review_title: Funny game with lots of possibilitues
reviews.review_description: I'm curious to see how it develops further. In meantime, I'm diligently cleaning the streets so I can try out the other sweeper cars and upgrade options in the game :) Fortunatelly collisions not making penalty points on my IRL drivers licence :))
I had fun with it. It has potential and from what I can see it's different from the other two sweepers. I'm curious to see what will be added in the next update.
